Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EUGENE CHANG OF STEIN & LUBIN, TEL. NO. 981-1550 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PHILIPPE A. TOUDIC OF DUANE MORRIS, TEL. NO. 957-3211 APPEARING FOR THE RECEIVER;
ATTY. MARY CATHERINE WIEDERHOLD, TEL. NO. 533-0735 APPEARING FOR MIRSADA KURTOVIC A PARTY SEEKING PERMISSION TO SUE,

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MS. WIEDERHOLD RAISED HER OBJECTION OF ALLOWING THE RECEIVER TO RE RELEASED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Leave To File Action Against Receivership
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
MIRSADA KURTOVIC'S MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING LEAVE TO FILE ACTION AGAINST RECEIVERSHIP.

APPEARANCES: Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. of Law Offices of Mary Catherine Wiederhold 533-0735 for moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING LEAVE TO FILE AN ACTION AGAINST THE RECEIVERSHIP IS GRANTED. IT WOULD BE INAPPROPRIATE FOR THE TENANT TO INTERVENE IN THIS CASE SO THE COURT IS GRANTING THIS MOTION TO ADD THE RECEIVER TO HER CASE. OSTROWSKI V. MILLER (1964) 226 CAL.APP.2D 79. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Plaintiff La Salle Bank National Association, As Trustee For The Registered Holders Of Lb-Ubs Commercial Mortgage Trust 2007-C1, Commercial Mortgage Pass-Through Certificates, Series 2007-C1, Acting By And Through, Midland Loan Services, Inc., Its Special Servicer, Order To Show Cause Re: Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff La Salle Bank National Association, as Trustee for the registered holders of LB-UBS Commercial Mortgage Trust 2007-C1, commercial mortgage pass-through certificates, series 2007-C1, acting by and through, Midland Loan Services, Inc., its special servicer, order to show cause re: confirmation of appointment of receiver and preliminary injunction in aid of receiver (per ex parte order of 8/28/09). Appearances: Joseph N. Demko, Esq. of JMBM (415) 398-8080, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
